concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive, specific criticism of advisor Pitt Yufei Huang (verbal offer rescinded after a year, emotional instability, direct quote), which appears to suppress legitimate observations rather than perform cleanup.
concerns.excerpt:
Pitt Yufei Huang  ECE UPMC Cancer Center
给组里的RA口头offer, 拿着饼吊着别人做一年然后在ddl鸽offer
情绪不稳定，经典名言：“你做的事不是PhD-Level”的
